privileged_info_summary: The task uses a synthetic ODP presentation file generated from hardcoded feature text in setup_task.sh. The expected checkmark characters are 5 valid Unicode symbols (✓ ✔ ☑ ✅ 🗸). The expected colors are 6 valid green colors including hex codes (#008000, #006400, #228b22, #32cd32, #00ff00) and the keyword 'green'. However, one of the required text snippets is incorrect: the metadata claims "Touchpad zoom gestures" should be preserved, but the actual generated text is "Support for zoom gestures when using touchpads". The substring "Touchpad zoom gestures" does not appear in the generated presentation. The other required snippet "QR Code generator" is correctly found in "QR Code generator improvements".
